key_points.text: Revenue grew 65% year-over-year to $215.9 billion in fiscal year 2026, with net income of $120.1 billion, representing 64% growth from prior year
Gross profit margin expanded to 71.1% in fiscal 2026 from 75.0% in fiscal 2025, while operating margin remained strong at 60.4%
NVIDIA is establishing itself as a data center-scale AI infrastructure company with strong platform strategy integrating hardware, software, algorithms, and services across multiple end markets

citation.quote: NVIDIA has a platform strategy, bringing together hardware, systems, software, algorithms, libraries, AI models and training data sets, and services to create unique value... we address them with a unified underlying programmable architecture allowing us to support several multi-billion-dollar end markets

key_points.text: NVIDIA powers over 78% of global supercomputers on the TOP500 list, including 9 of the top 10 systems on the Green500 list, demonstrating dominance in AI infrastructure

citation.quote: NVIDIA powers over 78% of the supercomputers on the global TOP500 list, including 9 of the top 10 systems on the Green500 list

key_points.text: Launched Blackwell Ultra platform in fiscal 2026 optimized for agentic and physical AI, with significant improvements in token throughput and cost per token versus Hopper generation

citation.quote: In fiscal year 2026, we launched and scaled the NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra platform, optimized for agentic, reasoning, and physical AI... it delivers a significant increase in token throughput and reduction in cost per token compared to the Hopper generation

key_points.text: Operating cash flow was strong at $102.7 billion in fiscal 2026, up 60% from $64.1 billion in fiscal 2025, demonstrating robust cash generation

citation.quote: Net cash provided by operating activities 102,718 ... 64,089

key_points.text: Company made $18.6 billion in investments in private companies and infrastructure funds in Q1 fiscal 2027, signaling confidence in long-term market opportunities

citation.quote: $18.6 billion in private companies and infrastructure funds. Some of these investments include AI model makers that may indirectly purchase or use our products in the cloud

key_points.text: Blackwell continued to account for the majority of system shipments in Q1 fiscal 2027, indicating strong demand for latest-generation data center products

citation.quote: Blackwell continued to account for the majority of our system shipments
